questions.question: Which ingest schema do Langfuse, Phoenix, and OpenLLMetry converge on?
options: OpenTelemetry GenAI semantic conventions over OTLP HTTP
questions.question_zh: Langfuse、Phoenix 和 OpenLLMetry 在哪种摄入 schema 上趋同?
options_zh: 每家厂商的私有 JSON
Prometheus exposition 格式
通过 OTLP HTTP 传输的 OpenTelemetry GenAI 语义约定
纯 CSV 日志文件

questions.question: Why separate ClickHouse and Postgres in the storage tier?
options: They are interchangeable and one is chosen at random
Postgres is faster for span ingest
ClickHouse handles columnar analytics over spans while Postgres holds users, sessions, and app metadata
questions.question_zh: 为什么在存储层把 ClickHouse 与 Postgres 分开?
options_zh: 两者可互换,随机选一个
Postgres 在 span 摄入上更快
ClickHouse 不能存字符串
ClickHouse 处理 span 上的列式分析,Postgres 保存用户、会话和应用元数据

questions.question: What does the tail-sampling processor in the OpenTelemetry Collector do?
options: Decides whether to keep a trace after it completes, using rules like keep errors plus sample successes
questions.question_zh: OpenTelemetry Collector 中的 tail-sampling processor 做什么?
options_zh: 在 trace 完成后才决定是否保留,例如「保留错误,采样成功」这样的规则
把旧 trace 重放进 Postgres
无条件地透传所有字节
截断 100ms 以下的 span

questions.question: How does the dashboard detect drift across weeks?
options: Computes PSI or KL divergence on pooled prompt embeddings and watches eval-score trends
questions.question_zh: dashboard 如何检测跨周的 drift?
options_zh: 在汇集后的 prompt embedding 上算 PSI 或 KL,并观察 eval-score 趋势
用肉眼看 dashboard
读取最新部署时间戳
统计唯一 trace ID 数量

questions.question: What is the deliverable's MTTR target on an injected PII-leak regression?
options: Under 5 minutes from bug deployed to Slack alert
questions.question_zh: 对于注入的 PII 泄漏回归,交付物的 MTTR 目标是?
options_zh: 1 小时内
24 小时内
下一个 on-call 班次内
从 bug 部署到 Slack 告警 5 分钟内

questions.question: Which SDK families must produce canonical GenAI spans to meet the trace-coverage rubric?
options: At least six: OpenAI, Anthropic, Google GenAI, LangChain, LlamaIndex, and vLLM
questions.question_zh: 要满足 trace-coverage 评分要求,哪些 SDK 家族必须产出规范的 GenAI span?
options_zh: 只有 vLLM
至少 6 个: OpenAI、Anthropic、Google GenAI、LangChain、LlamaIndex 和 vLLM
任意一个 SDK 即可
仅 OpenAI 和 Anthropic

questions.question: How are evaluation results linked back to the original LLM call?
options: As a separate Postgres table with no trace ID
As eval spans written as children of the parent trace in ClickHouse
questions.question_zh: 评估结果如何关联回原始 LLM 调用?
options_zh: 夜里通过邮件发出的 CSV
仅 Slack 消息
存在一张没有 trace ID 的 Postgres 表里
把 eval span 作为父 trace 的子 span 写入 ClickHouse
